vibe: Objective, architectural, high-energy, functional. A distinctive departure from soft SaaS tools.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Architectural grid. No wasted space, but elements are clearly delineated by sharp borders rather than massive whitespace padding.
spacing_and_layout.borders: 1px solid border-default. Use border-collapse patterns where applicable.

button.primary: bg-primary text-white font-bold rounded-none px-6 py-3 hover:bg-primary_hover transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-primary
button.secondary: bg-transparent text-primary border border-strong font-bold rounded-none px-6 py-3 hover:bg-surface transition-colors
button.ghost: bg-transparent text-secondary font-bold rounded-none px-4 py-2 hover:bg-surface hover:text-primary transition-colors

input.default: border border-default rounded-none px-4 py-3 text-primary bg-white focus:outline-none focus:border-strong focus:ring-1 focus:ring-strong transition-all placeholder:text-tertiary
input.composer: border-t border-default bg-white p-4 focus-within:border-strong transition-colors

chat_message.style: group flex gap-4 py-2 px-4 hover:bg-surface transition-colors
chat_message.author: font-bold text-primary text-sm font-heading

sidebar.container: w-64 bg-sidebar border-r border-default flex flex-col h-full
sidebar.channel_inactive: text-secondary hover:bg-surface hover:text-primary border-l-4 border-l-transparent transition-colors

admin_table.header: bg-sidebar text-left text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-secondary p-4 border-b border-default

gif_picker.modal: fixed inset-0 bg-modal_overlay backdrop-blur-sm flex items-center justify-center z-50
gif_picker.content: bg-white border border-strong w-full max-w-lg shadow-2xl flex flex-col max-h-[80vh]

motion.philosophy: Snappy, mechanical, instantaneous. No soft bounces or elastic easing.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for structural components to enforce the strict 0px border-radius and high-contrast aesthetic.
Use Shadcn UI for complex interactive components (Dialogs, Dropdowns, Toast) but STRIP all rounded corners (rounded-none) and subtle shadows, replacing them with hard 1px borders.
Do NOT use standard chat bubbles. Messages should be text blocks aligned to the square avatar, with a subtle hover state for the entire message row.
Admin Dashboard should use a strict, dense table layout with hard borders (border-collapse), completely ignoring the typical soft 'SaaS Card' look.
For the composer, use a large textarea with clear, bold Phosphor Icons for attachments (images/gifs/memes).
Every interactive element MUST include a data-testid attribute formatted as kebab-case, describing its role.
